summary: Frontend testing completed for PlayXBets betting platform. All requested features verified: BALL RUNNING/SUSPENDED cycle working correctly, dynamic odds display, live score from API, Min/Max labels visible, Session Markets with dynamic values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. BALL RUNNING/SUSPENDED cycle starts ~8 seconds after page loads on LIVE matches. Cycle: Active (8s) -> Ball Running (3s) -> Suspended (2s) -> Active. CSS animations for odds flash (green up, red down) are defined in index.css. Live score displays from CricketData API when available (Victoria vs South Australia has live data, Quetta match shows placeholder).

homepage_back_lay_columns.details: Homepage shows Back (Blue #1a56db) and Lay (Dark Red #991b1b) column headers with correct colors

live_match_navigation.details: Clicking on LIVE match (Quetta Gladiators) opens match page with LIVE badge visible

min_max_label.details: Match Odds section shows 'Min: 100 | Max: 2,00,000' label with data-testid='min-max-label'

match_odds_back_lay.details: Match Odds shows Back (Blue) and Lay (Dark Red) odds cells with values (e.g., 6.00/6.02 for Quetta, 1.07/1.09 for Karachi)

ball_running_match_odds.details: After ~8 seconds on live match, 'BALL RUNNING' text appears in Match Odds section header with data-testid='match-odds-status'

suspended_back_lay_cells.details: During ball delivery, Back/Lay cells show 'SUSPENDED' text with data-testid='suspended-label' and red pulsing animation

ball_running_session_markets.details: Session Markets rows show 'BALL RUNNING' labels with data-testid='ball-running-label' during ball delivery (4 labels found for 4 session rows)

cycle_completion.details: After BALL RUNNING (3s) -> SUSPENDED (2s) cycle completes, odds reappear normally with Back/Lay buttons clickable

live_score_section.details: LIVE SCORE section visible at top of match page with data-testid='live-score-section'. Victoria vs South Australia shows actual score: 'South Australia: 198/10 (76.4) | Victoria: 4/0 (1)'

session_markets_dynamic.details: Session Markets section shows dynamic values for 6/10/15/20 over runs that update based on match score data and run rate calculations

bet_slip_sidebar.details: Bet Slip panel visible on right side with data-testid='bet-slip-sidebar', shows balance and 'Click on odds to add selections' message

odds_click_login_required.details: Clicking on odds when not logged in shows 'Please login to place bets' toast and opens login modal

odds_flash_animations.details: CSS animations defined in index.css: odds-flash-up (green) and odds-flash-down (red) with 1.5s duration and box-shadow effects

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/victoria_match.png - Victoria vs South Australia with live score

technical_notes.ball_running_cycle: Implemented in MatchPage.js useEffect starting at line 429. Cycle: Active (8s) -> Ball Running (3s) -> Suspended (2s) -> Active
technical_notes.odds_flash_hook: useOddsFlash hook at line 32 tracks previous odds and applies CSS class when value changes
technical_notes.css_animations: Defined in index.css lines 123-150: flashGreen/flashRed keyframes with scale and background-color transitions
technical_notes.live_score_polling: LIVE_SCORE_POLL_INTERVAL = 10000ms (10 seconds) for fetching updated scores from API
